appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/architecture-hardening.md documenting SQLite connection pooling, locked-db retry behavior, and server shutdown cleanup invariants.
Added INBOX_POLL_INTERVAL runtime configuration details and fallback semantics to .factory/library/architecture-hardening.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update startup guidance in mission-worker-base/scrutiny-related procedures to run .factory/init.sh via `bash` fallback (or ensure executable bit before direct execution).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three architecture-hardening feature reviews reported the same setup deviation: direct execution of .factory/init.sh failed with Permission denied, then succeeded via `bash .../.factory/init.sh`.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml `test` command excludes audio/llm tests and may hide regressions.
Repeated init.sh executable-bit notes from multiple reviews.
